summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google OAuth integration with Emergent Auth for pharmacy patient portal. All major functionality working correctly with Facebook login properly disabled.
passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with proper branding
Login page shows Google OAuth button (Facebook correctly hidden)
Registration page shows Google OAuth button (Facebook correctly hidden)
Patient registration with username/password works correctly
Google OAuth button redirects to Emergent Auth (https://auth.emergentagent.com)
Emergent Auth callback API handles missing/invalid session IDs correctly
Navigation between landing, login, and registration pages works smoothly
All form elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Consent checkbox properly enables/disables registration submit button
